query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(images, '"/storage/"') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as storage_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(images) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(images) > 0 AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(images, '"/storage/"') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as valid_count,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM products
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(images, '"/storage/"') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as storage_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(images) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(images) > 0 AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(images, '"/storage/"') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as valid_count,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM products
